question: Which categories have the best profit margin?
sql: SELECT ii.product_category AS category, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price - ii.cost), 2) AS profit, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(oi.sale_price - ii.cost), SUM(oi.sale_price)) * 100, 1) AS margin_pct FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.inventory_items` ii ON ii.id = oi.inventory_item_id WHERE oi.status IN ('Complete', 'Shipped') GROUP BY category ORDER BY margin_pct DESC LIMIT 15
analyst_notes: Realized margin joins each sold item to ITS inventory unit (inventory_item_id) for the actual cost — not products.cost, which is the current catalog cost and drifts from what the sold unit cost. Margin % uses SAFE_DIVIDE: categories can have zero revenue in a window.
author: claude-draft
